chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1251 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For katcha peshi. 05.12.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel = None present for the petitioner. However, in the interest of justice, the matter is heard today as the question of life and liberty of a citizen is involved in the matter. The parawise comments have been filed by the official respondents, according to which the police officials have not caused any harassment to the petitioner and it has been further undertaken by the police officials that if petitioner will approach them, he will be provided protection in accordance with law. Parawise comments also confirm that no FIR has been lodged so far against the petitioner. This petition is disposed of with the above observation and with the directions that police officials should discharge their duties in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner, whenever he approaches them with such a request, but strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
